company_concept.description: Fetch every reported value of one US-GAAP concept for a company, such as Revenues, from SEC XBRL data.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

cik.description: Ten-digit zero-padded CIK number, such as 0000320193 for Apple.

tag.description: USD-denominated US-GAAP concept tag such as Revenues or Assets. Point-in-time concepts report no start date or frame on some entries; concepts reported in other units (shares, USD/shares) are not mapped and will fail.

items.description: Reported values for the concept, one per period and filing.

pagination.behavior: Returns all periods EDGAR holds for the concept.

company_concept.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for filing text or company profiles. Do not use it for non-USD concepts such as share counts or per-share figures; only the USD unit series is mapped.
company_concept.when_to_use: Use this for a company's reported financial line items across periods.

company_profile.description: Fetch a company's SEC registration profile (name, tickers, exchanges, industry) by CIK number.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

cik.description: Ten-digit zero-padded CIK number, such as 0000320193 for Apple.

pagination.behavior: Returns the registration profile; the filing index inside this payload is not mapped, use full_text_search for filings.

company_profile.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for filing text or filing lists; use full_text_search.
company_profile.when_to_use: Use this to identify a company registered with the SEC: name, ticker symbols, exchanges, and industry.

filings.description: List a company's most recent SEC filings from its EDGAR submissions history.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

cik.description: Ten-digit zero-padded CIK number, such as 0000320193 for Apple.

output_schema.description: Parallel arrays describing the company's recent filings; index i of every array refers to the same filing.

accession_numbers.description: EDGAR accession number for each filing, aligned by position.

filing_dates.description: Filing date for each entry, aligned by position with forms.

forms.description: Form type of each filing, newest first (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, 4, ...).

primary_documents.description: Primary document path inside each filing, aligned by position.

report_dates.description: Period-of-report date for each entry; empty when not applicable.

pagination.behavior: Returns the EDGAR 'recent' window (roughly the last 1,000 filings) in one response.

filings.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for full-text search across companies; use full_text_search. Do not use it for XBRL financial values; use company_concept.
filings.when_to_use: Use this to see what forms a company filed recently (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, Form 4) with dates and accession numbers.

full_text_search.description: Search the full text of SEC EDGAR filings and return matching documents with companies, forms, and dates.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

forms.description: Comma-separated SEC form types such as 10-K, 8-K, or DEF 14A.

q.description: Search words matched against filing text.

pagination.behavior: EDGAR full-text search returns the most relevant filings; refine q or forms to narrow.

full_text_search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for a known company's filing history; use company_submissions.
full_text_search.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs SEC filings mentioning given words, optionally restricted to a form type such as 10-K or 8-K.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: Downloading full filing documents from Archives is not mapped yet; results carry accession numbers to locate them.
SEC fair-access policy asks for a declared User-Agent and at most 10 requests per second; the recorded header declares this client.
The recent-filings index inside the submissions payload is large and unmapped; full_text_search covers filing discovery.
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.
